import numpy as np, matplotlib
matplotlib.use('Agg'); import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
names=['ARTAN_target','ARATH_chloro','ARATH_mito','Ecoli_LepA','Human_GUF1_mito']
M=np.array([[0,77.8,47.2,43.2,45.7],
            [77.8,0,49.0,47.8,46.3],
            [47.2,49.0,0,45.9,55.0],
            [43.2,47.8,45.9,0,43.5],
            [45.7,46.3,55.0,43.5,0]])
fig,ax=plt.subplots(figsize=(7,5.5))
Mm=M.copy(); np.fill_diagonal(Mm,100)
im=ax.imshow(Mm,cmap='viridis',vmin=40,vmax=100)
ax.set_xticks(range(5)); ax.set_yticks(range(5))
ax.set_xticklabels(names,rotation=45,ha='right'); ax.set_yticklabels(names)
for i in range(5):
    for j in range(5):
        v=Mm[i,j]
        ax.text(j,i,f"{v:.0f}",ha='center',va='center',
                color='white' if v<75 else 'black',fontsize=10,fontweight='bold')
plt.colorbar(im,label='% identity (global NW)')
ax.set_title('LepA/GUF1 pairwise % identity\nA0A2U1PS28 groups with chloroplast paralog (78%)')
plt.tight_layout(); plt.savefig('guf1_identity_matrix.png',dpi=130)
print("saved guf1_identity_matrix.png")
print("Target->chloroplast 77.8% vs ->mito clade 45-47%: chloroplast assignment confirmed")
